name: How does the biohazard cleanup process actually work from start to finish?

mainEntity.name: How does the biohazard cleanup process actually work from start to finish?

acceptedAnswer.text: Biohazard cleanup involves assessment, containment, remediation, cleaning/disinfection, and verification to ensure the area is safe. Technicians seal contaminated zones, remove hazardous materials using EPA-approved disinfectants, and conduct testing to confirm no pathogens remain.
acceptedAnswer.description: The process includes assessment, containment, removal of hazardous materials, EPA-approved disinfection, and verification testing to ensure safety.

description: The process includes assessment, containment, removal of hazardous materials, EPA-approved disinfection, and verification testing to ensure safety.
